About

A full-service construction company serving property owners, homeowners, investors, and businesses across the New York metropolitan area.

NXT GEN CONSTRUCTION is a New York City–based general contracting firm providing comprehensive construction services for both residential and commercial properties. We work across all five boroughs, as well as Long Island and Westchester, managing projects of varying scale with professionalism, consistency, and close attention to detail.

Our team handles a broad range of work, including interior renovations, exterior improvements, apartment and home remodeling, kitchen and bathroom upgrades, commercial build-outs, and full property transformations. From the earliest planning stages through final completion, we focus on delivering a process that is organized, efficient, and aligned with the client’s vision.

What distinguishes our approach is our commitment to quality workmanship and disciplined project management. We understand that construction is not only about how a finished space looks, but also about how well it performs over time. Every project is approached with care, coordination, and a standard of execution designed to protect the value of the property and the confidence of the client.

Whether the scope involves upgrading a single space or carrying out a complete renovation, NXT GEN CONSTRUCTION is committed to delivering work that is functional, refined, and built to last.

Residential & Commercial

We work with homeowners, landlords, developers, and business owners on projects ranging from targeted renovations to larger full-property improvements.

Service Area

Serving Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx, Staten Island, Long Island, and Westchester.

Construction Philosophy

Thoughtful planning, dependable coordination, clean execution, and a finish that reflects long-term value.

Services

Our work spans interior and exterior construction, renovation, modernization, and full-scale project delivery.

Interior Renovations

We renovate living spaces with a focus on layout improvement, finish quality, and practical functionality. This includes flooring, walls, ceilings, trim work, lighting, and comprehensive interior upgrades.

Kitchen & Bathroom Remodeling

We deliver kitchen and bathroom renovations that balance design, durability, and usability, with attention to cabinetry, tile, fixtures, countertops, plumbing coordination, and finish details.

Exterior Construction

Our exterior work includes façade improvements, structural repairs, entryways, hardscape-related enhancements, and updates that improve both curb appeal and property performance.

Residential Projects

From apartment upgrades to larger home transformations, we manage residential construction with a clear process, dependable communication, and a commitment to clean, high-quality results.

Commercial Build-Outs

We support commercial clients with interior build-outs and improvements tailored to operational needs, timelines, and brand presentation, creating spaces that are functional and professionally finished.

Full Property Transformations

For clients pursuing broader improvements, we coordinate full-scope renovations that unify structure, layout, finishes, and design intent into a complete and cohesive final result.

Selected Work

A curated project gallery featuring kitchens, bathrooms, open-concept living spaces, and elevated residential interiors.

Modern Kitchen

Dark cabinetry, refined finishes, and clean city-facing design.

Open-Concept Living

Bright residential renovation with a seamless kitchen and lounge layout.

Primary Bathroom

Natural stone finishes, warm metal accents, and spa-style detailing.

Classic Kitchen Upgrade

Light cabinetry, soft tones, and a polished, timeless finish.

Architectural Interior

Modern living space with clean lines, height, and balanced material contrast.

Custom Living Area

Open volume design with integrated lighting and refined spatial flow.

Minimal Bath Design

Soft textures, clean lines, and understated luxury in a compact footprint.
